subcodes.first_line: O pure God! This servant of Thy threshold, with heart and soul, sought after Thee, and in the path of Thy love did gallop his steed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یزدان پاک این بنده آستان از دل و جان جویان تو بود و در ره محبتت پویان رخش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @prayer for forgiveness, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
